name: abelian
description: Adversarial collaboration framework (Kahneman-style applied to LLM dispatch) for deep, innovative, long-horizon iteration with tractable doc and testable metric. Two LLM peers each propose AND challenge each other; mutual inspiration between rounds; mechanism-converge termination. 17 INVARIANTS rules harden against fabrication, drift, compaction, mission drift, cross-layer evidence confusion, fuzzy-program-contract, and now (v2.17) fuzzy-mission upstream. v2.17: opt-in `abelian sharpen` mode runs adversarial goal sharpening (triage + outcome distillation + metric forge + lever surfacing + Takeaway derivation, 5 passes with co-research divergence + dissect attack classes) to compile fuzzy mission to rule #16-compliant program.md draft. Native answer to OKR's hierarchical decomposition.
